id: pick-files

description: "Returns the selected file paths. If the user cancels the dialog,"

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Open a native OS multi-file picker dialog."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/dialog/pick-files"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the selected file paths. If the user cancels the dialog,
`paths` will be an empty array. Optionally accepts filters and a default directory.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>

  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

>
  
</RequestSchema>

>
  
</StatusCodes>
